title: inserts forgotten quotation mark
body:
#### What type of PR is this?
/kind documentation

#### What this PR does / why we need it:
Just insert quotation mark 😂 😂 
I think some people (not that I did) managed to copy and paste and received an error message.

#### How to verify it
Intense tool testing

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:
Fixes #None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?
Yes
